---
title: "Co-morbidity of malaria and soil-transmitted helminths in Nigeria: a joint Bayesian modelling approach"
subtitle: "Infectious Diseases of Poverty 14(1):28 (2025)"
date: 2025-04-02
doi: 10.1186/s40249-025-01276-x
authors:
  - Funmilayo Eshofonie
  - Olatunji Johnson
  - Eniola Gayawan
categories: ["Journal article"]
---

**Links:** [Publisher (DOI)](https://doi.org/10.1186/s40249-025-01276-x)

**Summary.** Applies a Bayesian coregionalization model to characterise the spatial co-distribution of malaria and soil-transmitted helminth infections across Nigeria, identifying regions of elevated co-endemicity — particularly in the South-South and South-East — and quantifying the correlation between the two disease burdens.
